bodies.reasoning: agent plan (hull-loft along y from measured sections; plan-view concavity cutters (fork slot/barb notches); engraved label grooves (<0.3 mm³) intentionally omitted); heuristic suggested: csg — analytic surfaces (cone, cylinder, plane) with no single dominant axis (largest coaxial cluster covers only 34%) and no prismatic direction -> CSG assembly of primitives with chamfers (cones) / fillets (tori).
